title: kentrophyllum monspeliensium
intro: Kentrophyllum monspeliensium, also known as Montpellier saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kentrophyllum monspeliensium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
